untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'major fundamental event' and '4+ consecutive daily closes above resistance' which cannot be expressed with allowed indicators alone. Fundamental events are exogenous signals outside technical indicator scope. Consecutive close patterns require multi-bar memory/lookback logic not supported by single-bar operators.
translation_notes: Used pivot as proxy for resistance level. Vol_ratio_20 approximates volume confirmation (1.5x multiple). Returns >= 0.02 represents 2% breakout magnitude in decimal scale. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification. Fundamental confirmation condition cannot be operationalized without external data feed or manual confirmation flag.
